title: iris palaestina
intro: Iris palaestina, also known as the Palestine Iris, is a flowering plant species in the iris family that is native to the Middle East and Mediterranean regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Iris palaestina include treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as skin conditions like eczema and wounds. Herbal preparations of Iris palaestina can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat various health issues.
